junior: Hey — pick a case below or start with the flagship. I'll hint as you scroll.
New here? The flagship case is the friendliest on-ramp — try it first.
I'm Casey. I grow up when you switch Junior → Staff. Weird? Try it inside any case.
Each case has a live demo you can break and fix. That's the point.
mid: Filter by track or jump to the reading library — I'll stay out of your way unless you want hints.
Flagship cases have demos. Break them, then fix them — that's the whole method.
Tone switcher changes my age and how deep I go, not just labels.
Use the library for external war stories; cases here are pattern-first with production subtext.
staff: Use the library for war stories. Cases here are pattern-first with production subtext.
Tone switcher changes my age and voice — not reading level labels. Try Staff in a flagship.
Demos are intentionally breakable. RUM deltas > lab numbers, but the lab shows you why.
Each case has a takeaway with trade-off notes. Skip to it if you know the concept.
